steps.title: Express buildings as a percentage of the total plot
steps.content:
The plot is 54.0% farmland and 46.0% pasture (100% − 54.0% = 46.0%). To find buildings as a percentage of the entire plot, multiply the building percentage by the land type percentage:

Buildings on farmland = 27.5% of 54.0% = 0.275 × 0.54 = 0.1485 = 14.85% of plot
Buildings on pasture = 12.5% of 46.0% = 0.125 × 0.46 = 0.0575 = 5.75% of plot

steps.title: Sum to find p
steps.content: The buildings on the entire plot are: $$p = 14.85\% + 5.75\% = 20.6\%$$
